title: Canonical kernel proof coupon
coreIntent: Produce a deterministic calibration coupon with matching nominal, fabrication, mesh, BOM, and assembly projections.

requirements.statement: The result includes calibration features for stock thickness, kerf, and fit classes.

interfaces.function: Exercise a thickness-driven tab and slot pair.

assumptions.statement: The coupon uses a provisional plywood profile until a physical coupon is selected.
